nasb.text: And according to Paul’s custom, he went to them, and for three Sabbaths reasoned with them from the Scriptures,

esv.text: And Paul went in, as was his custom, and on three Sabbath days he reasoned with them from the Scriptures,

cnv.text: 保羅照他的習慣進去，一連三個安息日，根據聖經與他們辯論，

ccb.text: 保罗照以往的习惯进入会堂，一连三个安息日引用圣经与当地人讨论，

csbs.text: 保罗照习惯进了会堂，一连三个安息日，引用经文向他们讲论，
